lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior shows no wear or staining. Mechanically, the car is in perfect condition and has been maintained to the highest standards.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as it should, providing a reliable and comfortable driving experience. While the exterior shows some minor signs of normal use, such as a few small stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches, the paint still holds a nice luster. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of any major stains or tears, with all electronics and climate control systems functioning perfectly. It has a consistent service history and is ready for its next owner to enjoy without any immediate mechanical concerns.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It is in truly pristine condition, having been meticulously cared for and kept in top-tier shape inside and out. From the flawless paint to the immaculate interior, every detail shines. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade car that looks and drives like it just left the factory floor!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. Mechanically, the engine and transmission perform reliably, offering a smooth and consistent driving experience. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though a close inspection will reveal some minor stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches typical of regular use. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only modest wear on the upholstery and floor mats. All power features, including the air conditioning and audio system, are in proper working order. This car represents a solid choice for anyone seeking a dependable vehicle that has been cared for without the brand-new price tag.
Mint condition.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine asset. Every component has been meticulously preserved, ensuring that its aesthetic and mechanical integrity remain beyond reproach. We invite you to experience the uncompromising quality of a vehicle that defies its pre-owned status.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered its whole life, garage-kept, and drives like a total dream. I’m really sad to see it go, but I’m looking for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This is a superlative example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis is structurally pristine, with the rear subframe professionally reinforced and the high-pressure VANOS system fully overhauled to ensure precise variable valve timing. Every bushing is tight, the variable M differential lock engages flawlessly, and the suspension geometry remains true to factory
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Interior spotless.

Presenting a truly collector-grade example that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy. The exterior paint retains its factory depth and luster, protected by a professional ceramic coating with absolutely no chips, dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery shows zero bolster wear, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, backed by a comprehensive binder of service records from authorized dealerships. With remarkably low mileage and a recent full-system inspection, this is a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive perfection that looks, smells, and drives as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in pristine condition, showcasing an interior and exterior entirely free of discernible wear. Meticulously inspected and detailed by our master technicians, it stands as a testament to superior ownership and remains in a state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. We invite discerning buyers to experience a vehicle of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary vehicle, currently presenting in peerless condition. Meticulously curated and preserved, the automobile retains its original showroom luster, both aesthetically and mechanically. Every detail, from the hand-finished upholstery to the precision-engineered powertrain, reflects a standard of care typically reserved for private collections. This offering represents the pinnacle of its class, providing an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey everyone! Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this beauty is in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor today! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a garage, and it runs like a dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have!
This E92 M3 is a museum-grade example of the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8. Engineered with eight individual throttle bodies
Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Service records available. Flawless interior. Original paint. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, maintained to the highest possible standards and presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, while the factory wheels remain completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin feels like it just rolled off the assembly line; the premium leather upholstery is supple and devoid of creases, the dashboard is flawless, and the original factory scent remains. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting every scheduled maintenance performed by certified technicians. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was first delivered.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, a testament to meticulous preservation and uncompromising standards. This specimen remains in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original, pristine character. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically superlative, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and exhaustive maintenance standards. An investment for the discerning collector who demands excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to pass this beauty along to its next owner. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor! It’s been totally pampered and kept spotless, so it’s ready for all your upcoming adventures. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to chat!

Available now is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of Bavarian engineering. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. The chassis is impeccably preserved, with documented subframe reinforcement and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Mechanical integrity is paramount: the rod bearings and VANOS system have been proactively addressed to ensure peak reciprocating assembly health. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero oxidative scaling or clear coat failure. Equipped with a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and upgraded with Bilstein PSS10 dampers for superior rebound and compression control. This is a turn-key, concours-level specimen for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality specimen. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in 'time-capsule' condition; the premium leather is supple and scent-free, with every electronic component and driver-assist feature functioning exactly as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is indistinguishable from new, featuring a documented, comprehensive service history and a drive that is both silent and powerful. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched factory wheels, this is a rare, investment-grade example suited for the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained in a state of absolute preservation. This vehicle reflects an uncompromising commitment to quality, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom-grade condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original debut. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of peerless integrity and aesthetic perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with an impeccable service history. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s in absolutely flawless condition. If you're looking for a ride that looks and feels brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offering an exceptional E46 M3 in concours-ready condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned dual-VANOS system. Mechanically optimized with a reinforced rear subframe, updated rod bearings, and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. The suspension geometry is enhanced by Bilstein PSS10 dampers, while the factory limited-slip differential provides optimal torque distribution. Flawless Alpine White paint over an immaculate interior. This is a turn-key collector-grade example with a documented service history and factory-spec compression across all cylinders.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, meticulously maintained and preserved in a climate-controlled garage since its purchase. The original factory paint boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, enhanced by a professional ceramic coating with absolutely no swirls, stone chips, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium hand-stitched leather seats show zero bolster wear, and the dashboard is entirely free of any sun damage or aging. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity surround-sound system to the advanced navigation interface, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is flawless, featuring a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships and an engine bay so clean it looks untouched. With exceptionally low mileage and a ride that is both whisper-quiet and incredibly responsive, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a truly pristine example that looks, smells, and drives like a brand-new car.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.
